title: Amtech T0702 25mm Rhombic Chrome Plated Iron Padlock
features: DURABLE: This 25mm rhombic padlock has a chrome plated iron body with a protective plastic cover and an anti-saw, anti-cut 4mm diameter hardened steel shackle
TAMPER RESISTANT: Supplied with 3 keys, it has an anti-pick precision pin tumbler and domino key mechanism
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 25mm Rhombic Chrome Plated Iron Padlock See more
